description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Saturday, March 21, I was invited to and attended the Hanno Lions Club Sakura Lantern Lighting Ceremony. This lighting ceremony is held so that the Hanno Lions Club Sakura (cherry tree area) will be cherished by residents as a famous cherry blossom viewing spot.

I offer my thanks to everyone involved who worked hard to make this ceremony possible.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13336.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno Lions Club Sakura Lantern Lighting Ceremony
